query:
-- Inserir países primeiro
INSERT INTO countries (name, slug, flagUrl) VALUES
('Inglaterra', 'inglaterra', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/gb-eng.png'),
('Espanha', 'espanha', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/es.png'),
('Itália', 'italia', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/it.png'),
('Alemanha', 'alemanha', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/de.png'),
('França', 'franca', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/fr.png'),
('Portugal', 'portugal', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/pt.png'),
('Holanda', 'holanda', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/nl.png'),
('Turquia', 'turquia', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/tr.png'),
('Arábia Saudita', 'arabia-saudita', 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/flags/sa.png');

-- Inserir ligas vinculadas aos países
INSERT INTO leagues (countryId, name, slug, division, logoUrl) VALUES
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'inglaterra'), 'Premier League', 'premier-league', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/13/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'espanha'), 'La Liga', 'la-liga', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/53/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'italia'), 'Serie A', 'serie-a', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/31/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'alemanha'), 'Bundesliga', 'bundesliga', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/19/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'franca'), 'Ligue 1', 'ligue-1', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/16/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'portugal'), 'Primeira Liga', 'primeira-liga', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/308/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'holanda'), 'Eredivisie', 'eredivisie', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/10/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'turquia'), 'Süper Lig', 'super-lig', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/26/light_60.png'),
((SELECT id FROM countries WHERE slug = 'arabia-saudita'), 'Pro League', 'pro-league', 1, 'https://cdn.sofifa.net/meta/league/2012/light_60.png');

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT c.name AS pais, l.name AS liga, l.slug FROM leagues l JOIN countries c ON l.countryId = c.id ORDER BY c.name;
